name: Scalloped Corn for Two
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Fresh corn, cut from the cob
1/4 cup Round buttery cracker crumbs (Ritz crackers)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first five ingredients in a bowl and mix well.
2. Pour the mixture into a lightly greased 2-cup baking dish, dotting with 1 tablespoon of butter.
3. Sprinkle the cracker crumbs mixed with melted butter over the corn mixture.
4. Bake at 375 degrees F for 40 minutes.
5. Yield: 2 servings.
From Mrs. J.T. Ballard of Texas in September, 1982 "Southern Living"
